description: Crafted for the urban style maven, this wallet from fastrack is a must have for those who love organising their wallet space. Dimensions : 19.5 cm x 10.5 cm Crafted from genuine leather One main zippered compartment Two small compartments on the front with six card holders and press button closures One small strap attached to the zip Brand logo embossed on the top Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
